nostalgiaetherealcollection_file32.episode: 2000's Kenan And Kel Marathon On Noggin Channel.ia.mp4
nostalgiaetherealcollection_file32.desc:
Welcome to nostalgia central. NostalgiaEthereal's aka The Retro Connoisseur's wide collection of nostalgic content all in one place for everyone caring to go back in time for hours upon hours. VHS recordings ranging from the 90's to 00's, long marathons of obscure television, vintage cartoons and anime, retro drive-in movie projects, TV-movie broadcast recreations, original commercials throughout, Adult Swim-related content, and September 11th-related content. This is a time-machine in the form of a database. As time progresses, more will be added as I acquire more VHS tapes to transfer. So be on the lookout as time moves on for new content uploaded. Archiving these things is HIGHLY important and crucial to preservation of a time period that has long past and must be kept alive through data-hoarding archived media catalogues such as this.
I do not own any of the content shared here. Only for historical preservation and entertainment purposes.

CSPAN2_20220329_022700_Company_Execs_Tes.show: Company Execs Testify on Semiconductor Shortage Impact on Innovation : CSPAN2 : March 28, 2022 10:27pm-1:00am EDT
CSPAN2_20220329_022700_Company_Execs_Tes.desc:
Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger said "our economic and national security are dependent on semiconductors" and urged support for funding of the CHIPS for America Act while testifying before the Senate Commerce Committee. He along with Micron CEO Sanjay Mehrotra, Lam Research CEO Tim Archer, and PACCAR Inc. CEO Preston Feight testified on semiconductor supply chain shortages and future technology investment. Other topics discussed included job creation, education and skills training, competition with China, supply chain bottlenecks, and national security concerns.

Sponsor: Senate Commerce, Science,and Transportation Committee
